name: deep-research
description: Claude Code research ladder: 6 composable skills (L0→L5) from 60s fact-check to 40-min academic investigation, plus /osint-research for entity discovery (domain/IP/email/person/company). Stack: Firecrawl + Tavily (search + research with --output-schema verdicts) + Exa + optional Codex CLI cross-model channel.
